labor.s: Human Rights Watch — 2024: Supply-chain transparency and labour-rights concerns.

privacy.s: State regulator action: TX AG (most recent 2026-02-19). Attorney General Ken Paxton Files Fourth Anti-CCP Lawsuit in Three Days by Suing Temu for Deceptive Marketing and Illegal Data Harvesting

health.s: 11 CPSC recalls (9 in past 24 months); latest hazard: the recalled children's pajama sets violate the flammability standards for child.

topHazards.label: The recalled children's pajama sets violate the flammability standards for children's sleepwear, posing a risk of burn injuries to children.
The recalled helmets violate the mandatory safety standard for bicycle helmets because the helmets do not comply with the positional stability and certificatio…
The recalled 6-in-1 Pounding Game violates the mandatory federal regulation for magnets because it contains a magnet that can become loose, posing an ingestion…
The recalled sling carriers violate the federal safety regulations for sling carriers, including requirements for structural integrity and occupant retention, …
The recalled crib bumpers violate the federal crib bumper ban, posing a suffocation hazard to infants. Padded crib bumpers are banned by the federal Safe Sleep…

sampleRecalls.title: Multi-Purpose Helmets Recalled Due to Risk of Serious Injury or Death from Head Injury; Violates Mandatory Standard for Bicycle Helmets; Sold on Temu by Foubeaka and Geniuss
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Foubeaka and Geniuss multi-purpose helmets. The recalled helmets were sold in white and black and in size small (S), fitting a head circumference of about 18.9 to 20.5 inches. The helmets have black padding, straps, a buckle and a knob at the back for adjusting the helmet's fitting. The size is pr…
hazards: The recalled helmets violate the mandatory safety standard for bicycle helmets because the helmets do not comply with the positional stability and certificatio…

sampleRecalls.title: 6-in-1 Pounding Games Recalled Due to Ingestion Hazard; Violation of Federal Regulations for Magnets; Sold Exclusively on Temu.com by DMITOY
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves the 6-in-1 Pounding Game that consists of a wooden frame with a frog clock on each end. One side of the game has a xylophone, and the other side has three colorful gears. The top of the game has circular holes and wooden pegs with animal faces that pop up and down. The game comes with a set of woo…
hazards: The recalled 6-in-1 Pounding Game violates the mandatory federal regulation for magnets because it contains a magnet that can become loose, posing an ingestion…

sampleRecalls.title: Sling Carriers Recalled Due to Fall Hazard; Violation of Federal Regulations for Sling Carriers; Sold on Temu.com by Sunkids Factory
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves sling carriers with style number 0007-66 printed on the label. They have white plastic buckles, adjustable straps and mesh fabrics and were sold in green, gray and pink colors.
hazards: The recalled sling carriers violate the federal safety regulations for sling carriers, including requirements for structural integrity and occupant retention, …

sampleRecalls.title: Baofali Crib Bumpers Recalled Due to Suffocation Hazard; Violation of Federal Ban on Crib Bumpers; Sold Exclusively on Temu.com by Unique Person Home Goods
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Baofali 4-in-1 Microfiber Crib Safety Bumpers with model numbers JJ25B-A1, JJ25B-A2 and JJ25B-A3. They are sold in white, gray and pink colors and have a rectangular shape with fabric ties attached. They are approximately 52 inches long by 10 inches tall.
hazards: The recalled crib bumpers violate the federal crib bumper ban, posing a suffocation hazard to infants. Padded crib bumpers are banned by the federal Safe Sleep…

sampleRecalls.title: Toy Guns Recalled Due to Eye Injury Hazard; Failure to Meet Federal Safety Regulations for Projectile Toys; Sold Exclusively on Temu.com by Youjiu
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Victor Electric folding soft bullet toy guns. They were sold in black/green and black/sand yellow colors with "KRISS VECTOR" and ".45 ACP" printed on the sides of the toy gun. The toy gun is sold with accessories including a magazine, holographic sight, foam bullet projectiles and toy goggles.
hazards: The recalled toy guns fail to meet federal safety standards, as they do not have a blaze orange tip that is required by the mandatory toy standard to different…
products: Victor Electric Folding Soft Bullet Toy Guns
